source: INTRO MODULE_ The Basics of Nodes and Node Dojo_2MAY2024.blend
materialParity: The 3-node Attribute Viewer N++ shader is now reconstructed strictly: its Geometry Attribute Vector feeds Emission Color at Strength 1. The evaluated Cube.014 soup does not contain the requested attribute_viewer_n++_ field, so Blender's missing-attribute rule resolves the 21,078-index material range to zero/black; the browser now does the same instead of substituting its green diagnostic material.
validation: Exact authored topology and matching two-panel composition. Blender 5.1.2 micro-references prove the Quadrilateral to Bezier, Fillet, and length-Resample chain is coordinate-exact. Realize Instances now scales the built-in curve radius before the BAR ROWS line-thickness sweep, reducing the symmetric X-bounds residual from 0.004715 to 0.000366 units; Y and Z bounds are exact.
